L q mass_Z fill_y_lower A_lower E_y I rhs_no_bad A/rhs dil2 singular_values
10 11.1111 10000 3333.33 37037 1 11.1111 22.2222 1666.67 1 (10.0, 0.1, 0.01, 0.01)
30 100 810000 270000 2.7e+07 1 100 200 135000 1 (30.0, 0.03333333333333333, 0.0011111111111111111, 0.0011111111111111111)
100 1111.11 1e+08 3.33333e+07 3.7037e+10 1 1111.11 2222.22 1.66667e+07 1 (100.0, 0.01, 0.0001, 0.0001)
300 10000 8.1e+09 2.7e+09 2.7e+13 1 10000 20000 1.35e+09 1 (300.0, 0.0033333333333333335, 1.1111111111111112e-05, 1.1111111111111112e-05)
1000 111111 1e+12 3.33333e+11 3.7037e+16 1 111111 222222 1.66667e+11 1 (1000.0, 0.001, 1e-06, 1e-06)

Asymptotics:
  q ~ L^2/9, Mass(Z_y)=L^4, Fill(Z_y) >= L^4/3
  A >= L^6/27, E_y=1, I=L^2/9
  R1*I + I^2/(S1*q) = 2L^2/9
  A / controlled_RHS >= L^4/6
  For each z, B_z={u_z}xC is 2-dimensional, so the restriction
  of any rectifiable 3-filling to B_z has zero 3-mass.
